details.reasoning: Implementation is complete and correct. The new ImageTextToTextPipeline class has an async _call method that accepts images and text prompt. It properly imports and uses AutoModelForImageTextToText, processes images via processor to extract pixel_values, tokenizes text inputs, calls model.generate() with both modalities, and returns results with generated_text field. The pipeline is correctly registered in SUPPORTED_TASKS with type 'multimodal' and includes comprehensive JSDoc with all required @typedef entries. The implementation follows existing pipeline patterns (prepareImages, processor, tokenizer, model.generate) and maintains proper batching logic. No existing classes were modified. All rubric requirements are met.
